user.title: Connect to Acuity NVR
user.description: Enter the NVR URL. Recommended: the token-gated Scrypted endpoint, e.g. `https://scrypted.example.com/endpoint/@acuity/nvr/public` (requires the API Token set in the plugin). Alternative: the standalone server, e.g. `https://<host>:10444` (turn off certificate verification for Scrypted's self-signed cert).

data.api_token: API token (from the plugin's Network settings)

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the NVR. Check the URL and that the plugin is running.
error.invalid_auth: The NVR rejected the API token. Check the API Token setting in the plugin.
error.invalid_url: Enter a full URL starting with http:// or https://.
